rationale: The page contains a single multiple-choice question (MCQ) regarding the Padma Awards, which is relevant for the History and Culture subject.
cleanedText: Prelims Type MCQ With reference to the Padma Awards, which one of the following statements is correct? (a) Padma Awards are one of the highest civilian honours of India announced annually on the eve of Independence Day. (b) Padma Awards are conferred on the recommendations made by the Padma Awards Committee, which is constituted by the President of India every year. (c) The classification of the Padma Vibhushan awards was renamed to Padma Vibhushan, Padma Bhushan and Padma Shri in 1950. (d) All persons without distinction of race, occupation, position or sex are eligible for these awards.
